---
title: "Álbumes favoritos"
# subtitle: ""
date: "2026-03-20"
draft: true
categories: [música]
---

<!---  
::: {.playlist .centrar}
<iframe allow="autoplay *; encrypted-media *; fullscreen *; clipboard-write" frameborder="0" height="450" style="width:100%;overflow:hidden;border-radius:10px;" sandbox="allow-forms allow-popups allow-same-origin allow-scripts allow-storage-access-by-user-activation allow-top-navigation-by-user-activation" src="https://embed.music.apple.com/cl/playlist/favs-the-body/pl.u-mJy8y9JuBAM8JK"></iframe>
:::
--->

### Kayo Dot: Choirs of the Eye
rock progresivo, rock avant-garde

### Magma: 1.001° Centigrades
rock progresivo, jazz rock

### Between the Buried and Me: Colors
metal progresivo

### Maudlin of the Well: Part the Second
rock progresivo, rock avant-garde

### Rosetta: The Galilean Satellites
sludge, post metal

### Mary Halvorson: Code Girl
jazz avant-garde

### Cynic: Traced In Air
death metal progresivo, metal fusion

### The Faceless: Planetary Duality
death metal técnico

### Victory Over The Sun: Dance You Monster to my Soft Song!
metal progresivo, black metal, metal avant-garde
